п»ҝ================================================================================
Emojis in variable names
================================================================================

let вӯҗпёҸ = "star"
let рҹҢҷ = "moon"
let вҳҒпёҸвҳҖпёҸвҳҒпёҸ = "clouds and sun"

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (property_declaration
    (value_binding_pattern)
    (pattern
      (simple_identifier))
    (line_string_literal
      (line_str_text)))
  (property_declaration
    (value_binding_pattern)
    (pattern
      (simple_identifier))
    (line_string_literal
      (line_str_text)))
  (property_declaration
    (value_binding_pattern)
    (pattern
      (simple_identifier))
    (line_string_literal
      (line_str_text))))

================================================================================
Multi-codepoint emojis
================================================================================

func рҹҸғрҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ() {
}

рҹҸғрҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ()


func рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ’ӢвҖҚрҹ‘Ё(рҹҷӢрҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ рҹҷӢвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: Man, рҹҷӢрҹҸ»вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ рҹҷӢвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ2: Man) {
}

рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ’ӢвҖҚрҹ‘Ё(рҹҷӢрҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: a, рҹҷӢрҹҸ»вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: b)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (function_declaration
    (simple_identifier)
    (function_body))
  (call_expression
    (simple_identifier)
    (call_suffix
      (value_arguments)))
  (function_declaration
    (simple_identifier)
    (parameter
      (simple_identifier)
      (simple_identifier)
      (user_type
        (type_identifier)))
    (parameter
      (simple_identifier)
      (simple_identifier)
      (user_type
        (type_identifier)))
    (function_body))
  (call_expression
    (simple_identifier)
    (call_suffix
      (value_arguments
        (value_argument
          (value_argument_label
            (simple_identifier))
          (simple_identifier))
        (value_argument
          (value_argument_label
            (simple_identifier))
          (simple_identifier))))))

================================================================================
Emojis with numbers in them
================================================================================

let number4пёҸвғЈ = nummber2пёҸвғЈ + number2пёҸвғЈ

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (property_declaration
    (value_binding_pattern)
    (pattern
      (simple_identifier))
    (additive_expression
      (simple_identifier)
      (simple_identifier))))
